addition.item: Added Joomla Content Source support alongside traditional RSS feeds
Added Source Type selector with RSS Feeds and Joomla Content modes
Added Joomla Latest Articles source mode
Added Joomla Featured Articles source mode
Added Joomla Categories source mode
Added Joomla Selected Articles source mode
Added Joomla Category Picker with search and pagination support
Added Joomla Article Picker with search and pagination support
Added Joomla Content JSON cache generation
Added Joomla Content support for iframe and JavaScript embeds

fix.item: Fixed content selection workflows for large Joomla websites by replacing manual ID entry requirements
Fixed administrator usability issues when selecting Joomla content sources

change.item: Expanded DevArt RSS Widgets beyond RSS aggregation to support local Joomla content publishing
Improved content syndication capabilities for publishers and multi-site Joomla environments
Maintained full compatibility with existing RSS widget architecture and rendering systems

note.item: Existing RSS widgets remain fully compatible
Existing iframe and JavaScript embeds continue to function normally
Safe upgrade from all previous 1.0.x releases

addition.item: Added Embed Height Mode with Auto Height and Fixed Height options
Added automatic iframe height detection for embedded widgets
Added automatic JavaScript embed height detection for responsive external websites
Added responsive embed resizing support across desktop, tablet and mobile devices

fix.item: Fixed situations where embedded widgets could require manual height adjustments
Fixed responsive rendering inconsistencies for embedded widgets on different screen sizes
Fixed iframe and JavaScript embed height handling for variable content lengths

change.item: Improved external widget rendering on responsive websites
Improved iframe embed usability through automatic height calculation
Improved JavaScript embed integration for third-party websites
Fallback Iframe Height is now used as a fallback value when automatic sizing is unavailable

note.item: Recommended update for all installations using iframe or JavaScript embeds

addition.item: Added full Joomla 6 native DevArt RSS Widgets package
Added administrator component for creating and managing RSS widgets
Added frontend module for displaying RSS widgets inside Joomla websites
Added content plugin support for embedding RSS widgets in Joomla content
Added Joomla Scheduled Task plugin for automated RSS fetching
Added multi-feed RSS aggregation support
Added per-feed item limit configuration
Added manual Fetch Now action for widget feeds
Added cron URL support for external scheduled fetching
Added static JSON cache generation for frontend rendering
Added fallback to the last successful fetch when a feed update fails
Added cache status dashboard and maintenance tools
Added clear JSON cache action
Added local image cache support
Added image resize, recompression and WEBP conversion support
Added configurable image cache retention settings
Added iframe embed output for external websites
Added JavaScript embed output for external websites
Added global domain access policy for embedded widgets
Added domain usage registry for embedded widgets
Added analytics foundation for embedded widgets
Added Google Analytics 4 event support for iframe and JavaScript embeds
Added built-in analytics consent panel for embedded widgets
Added permanent Privacy recall link for changing analytics consent
Added import and export tools for portable widget configuration
Added GitHub-based Joomla update server support

change.item: RSS widget architecture designed specifically for Joomla 6 and PHP 8.2+
Frontend rendering optimized for high-traffic editorial and news websites
Static JSON cache architecture used to reduce database and RSS feed load
Cloudflare and CDN-friendly rendering strategy implemented for production use
Analytics tracking limited to iframe and JavaScript embeds and not applied to internal Joomla module rendering

security.item: Added ACL enforcement for administrator operations
Added CSRF protection for administrator actions
Added RSS feed URL validation and SSRF protection
Added domain allow and block policy controls for external embeds
Added safe output escaping for frontend and embed rendering
Added GDPR-oriented consent controls for analytics in embedded widgets

note.item: Initial public production release of DevArt RSS Widgets for Joomla 6
Built for Joomla 6 only with PHP 8.2+
No migration required for new installations
Always test on a staging environment before production deployment
